data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a failed item triggers a work order or equipment lockout. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a forklift fails inspection and is locked out, it does not provide evidence of the system's behavior in terms of creating a work order or the specific mechanism for triggering the lockout. The evidence only confirms that the forklift is locked out but lacks details on the work order creation process, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence provided that explicitly shows the creation of a work order upon a failed inspection.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for work order creation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a work order is created when an item fails inspection.
